title: × Hadrodungsia zaslawskii
taxonomy: × Hadrodungsia zaslawskii is a genus and species within the family Orchidaceae. This epiphytic orchid is native to a specific region. The classification of × Hadrodungsia zaslawskii is further detailed by its inclusion in the Paphiopedilum subgenus, specifically within the subgenus Eurychilopsis. × Hadrodungsia zaslawskii is a naturally occurring hybrid and thus a nothogenus. Its classification reflects the complex relationships between orchid species and their hybrids.
